response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project work via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or navigation systems, and his recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js rather than the low-latency, systems-level C++ required for routing tiling pipelines.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and systems-level performance optimization
concerns: No visible commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipelines
Recent roles emphasize web/TypeScript over low-level systems programming for high-performance routing tiles
Limited evidence of distributed systems expertise in fault-tolerant, global-scale data pipelines
